Description: Implement secure user authentication and account management
Acceptance Criteria: All authentication features including registration

Summary: US-001: User Registration with Email Validation
Description: New users can create accounts with email and password validation
Acceptance Criteria:
- Registration form accepts valid email
- Email uniqueness validation
- Password complexity validation (8+ chars, uppercase, lowercase, numbers, special)
- Confirmation email sent with activation link
- Account activation required before login

Summary: US-002: User Login with Valid Credentials
Description: Registered users can login with correct email and password
Acceptance Criteria:
- Login form accepts email and password
- Credentials validated against database
- JWT token generated on successful login
- Session created with 30-min timeout
- User redirected to dashboard

Description: User receives clear feedback for incorrect login attempts
Acceptance Criteria:
- Invalid credentials rejected
- Error message displayed
- Failed login attempts tracked (max 5)
- Account locked after 5 failed attempts for 15 minutes

Description: User sessions are created and destroyed correctly
Acceptance Criteria:
- Session created after successful login
- Session timeout after 30 minutes
- Session destroyed after logout
- User cannot access app without valid session
- Multiple sessions handled correctly

Description: User can reset forgotten password
Acceptance Criteria:
- Forgot Password link on login page
- Reset link sent to registered email
- Reset link valid for 24 hours only
- Password reset form validates complexity rules
- Confirmation email sent after reset

Description: User can enable MFA for enhanced security
Acceptance Criteria:
- MFA option available in account settings
- Support TOTP (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator)
- QR code provided for setup
- Backup codes generated (8-10 codes)
- MFA required on login if enabled

Description: User can update profile information
Acceptance Criteria:
- Edit name, email, phone number
- Profile picture upload (max 5MB)
- Change password with current password verification
- View account activity log
- Manage notification preferences

Description: API requests require valid authentication
Acceptance Criteria:
- All API endpoints require valid JWT token
- Invalid tokens rejected with 401 status
- Token expiration enforced
- Token refresh mechanism working
- API responses match UI expectations

Description: Product discovery with advanced search filtering and inventory management
Acceptance Criteria: Product listing

Description: Customer can view all available products in a paginated list
Acceptance Criteria:
- Product listing shows image, name, price, rating
- Pagination support (10, 25, 50 items per page)
- Default sort by popularity
- Products load within 2 seconds
- No duplicate products shown

Description: Customer can search for products by name or keyword
Acceptance Criteria:
- Search box visible on every page
- Search returns results within 1 second
- Fuzzy matching for typos
- Search history saved for logged-in users
- No results page shows suggestions

Description: Customer can filter products by category price rating and availability
Acceptance Criteria:
- Category filter (multi-select)
- Price range slider ($0 - $10,000)
- Rating filter (1-5 stars)
- Availability filter (In Stock, Out of Stock)
- Apply Filters and Clear All buttons

Description: Customer can sort products by price and name
Acceptance Criteria:
- Sort options: Name (A-Z, Z-A), Price (Low-High, High-Low), Popularity
- Selected sort option highlighted
- Sorting applies to current view
- Sort preference persists during session

Description: Customer can view detailed product information
Acceptance Criteria:
- Product name, price, SKU displayed
- Product images with zoom functionality
- Product specifications and details
- Customer reviews and ratings
- Stock status indicator
- Add to Cart button visible

Description: Verified purchaser can write product reviews
Acceptance Criteria:
- Review form accessible from order history
- 1-5 star rating available
- Title and comment fields (required)
- Image upload option (max 3 images)
- Verified Purchase badge displayed
- Review moderation before display

Description: Search shows autocomplete suggestions while typing
Acceptance Criteria:
- Suggestions appear after 2 characters
- Response time < 100ms
- Top 5-10 suggestions displayed
- Product images shown in suggestions
- Click suggestion to navigate to product

Description: Admin can create new product listings
Acceptance Criteria:
- Product creation form with all fields
- SKU, name, description, price, category required
- Product images upload (max 10 images)
- Initial stock level input
- Publish immediately or save as draft

Description: Admin can edit product information
Acceptance Criteria:
- Edit form pre-populated with current data
- Edit any field (except SKU for existing products)
- Image management (add, remove, reorder)
- Price change with history tracking
- Publish/unpublish toggle

Description: Admin can adjust inventory stock quantities
Acceptance Criteria:
- Edit inventory form per product
- Quantity adjustment or set exact amount
- Reason for adjustment (dropdown)
- Change logged in audit trail
- Timestamp and user recorded

Description: Admin can import inventory data via CSV file
Acceptance Criteria:
- CSV upload interface available
- CSV format template provided
- File validation before import
- Preview of data before confirmation
- Error reporting for invalid rows

Summary: US-020: Admin Set Low Stock Alerts
Description: Admin can set low stock thresholds for products
Acceptance Criteria:
- Set reorder level per product
- Email notification when stock <= threshold
- In-app notification in dashboard
- Daily summary of low-stock items
- Alert suppression once restocked

Description: Shopping cart functionality and secure checkout process
Acceptance Criteria: Cart management and multi-step secure checkout

Description: Customer can add product to shopping cart
Acceptance Criteria:
- Add to Cart button visible on product page
- Quantity selector available (1-999)
- Out-of-stock items disabled
- Confirmation toast displayed
- Cart badge updates immediately

Description: Customer can view shopping cart contents
Acceptance Criteria:
- Cart displays all items with images, names, prices
- Item quantity and subtotal per line item
- Cart subtotal, taxes, shipping calculated
- Total price prominently displayed
- Continue Shopping and Proceed to Checkout buttons

Description: Customer can update item quantities in cart
Acceptance Criteria:
- Quantity increment/decrement buttons (+ / -)
- Direct quantity input field
- Min quantity: 1, Max: available stock
- Line subtotal updates in real-time
- Out-of-stock validation prevents overselling

Description: Customer can remove items from cart
Acceptance Criteria:
- Remove button on each cart item
- Confirmation dialog before removal
- Item removed immediately
- Cart total updates
- Undo option available for 10 seconds

Description: Customer can apply discount codes to orders
Acceptance Criteria:
- Coupon code input field in cart
- Apply Code button
- Code format validation (alphanumeric, case-insensitive)
- Real-time discount calculation
- Error messages for invalid/expired codes

Description: Shopping cart persists across sessions
Acceptance Criteria:
- Cart persists during session
- Cart persists during logout (registered users)
- Cart syncs with backend
- Cart consistent across pages
- Cart survives browser refresh

Description: Cart clears after successful checkout
Acceptance Criteria:
- Cart clears after checkout completion
- Confirmation message displayed
- Order confirmation sent
- Cart badge resets to 0

Description: Customer can select shipping method
Acceptance Criteria:
- Shipping options: Standard, Express, Overnight
- Shipping cost displayed per method
- Estimated delivery date shown
- Free shipping indicator if applicable
- Default to Standard shipping

Description: Guest users can complete purchase without account
Acceptance Criteria:
- Continue as Guest option on checkout
- Email entered for order confirmation
- All required fields for shipping/payment
- No account creation required
- Order confirmation email sent

Description: Customer can pay for order securely
Acceptance Criteria:
- Multiple payment methods available
- SSL/TLS encryption for payment data
- Payment gateway integration (Stripe)
- Card tokenization for saved cards
- Fraud detection check
- Clear error messages for failed payments

Description: Customer can review complete order before confirming
Acceptance Criteria:
- Order summary page before confirmation
- All items listed with quantities and prices
- Shipping address displayed
- Shipping method and cost shown
- Discount amount applied
- Final total prominently displayed

Description: Customer receives order confirmation with receipt
Acceptance Criteria:
- Confirmation page shown after order creation
- Order ID generated and displayed
- Order summary with all items
- Confirmation email sent immediately
- Invoice PDF attached to email

Description: Checkout validates all required fields
Acceptance Criteria:
- Required fields enforced
- Validation messages shown clearly
- Invalid input rejected
- User info persists across checkout steps
- Inputs sanitized properly

Description: System prevents duplicate order submission
Acceptance Criteria:
- Order created only once
- Duplicate submission prevented
- Submit button disabled after click
- Loading indicator shown
- Idempotent API calls

Description: Order viewing tracking and management for customers
Acceptance Criteria: Customer order history

Description: Customer can view order history
Acceptance Criteria:
- Order list shows order ID, date, status, total
- Default sort by date (newest first)
- Pagination for large order history
- Order status badge displayed
- Quick filters by date and status

Description: Customer can view detailed order information
Acceptance Criteria:
- All order items with quantities and prices
- Order date and current status
- Shipping address and method
- Delivery tracking information
- Payment method used (masked)
- Download invoice as PDF

Description: Customer can track shipment in real-time
Acceptance Criteria:
- Tracking information on order detail
- Carrier name and tracking number shown
- Link to carrier's tracking page
- Estimated delivery date
- Status updates (in transit, out for delivery, delivered)

Description: Customer can cancel order if not shipped
Acceptance Criteria:
- Cancel button available for Processing orders
- Cancel button disabled once order ships
- Cancellation confirmation dialog
- Order status updated to Cancelled
- Refund initiated automatically

Description: Customer can request return or refund
Acceptance Criteria:
- Return button available on delivered orders (within 30 days)
- Select items to return
- Reason for return (dropdown)
- Return shipping label generated
- Refund amount calculated

Description: Customer receives order status notifications
Acceptance Criteria:
- Email notification on order confirmation
- Email notification when order ships with tracking
- Email on delivery attempt
- In-app notifications for all status changes
- Notification preferences manageable

Description: Administrative order management and business analytics
Acceptance Criteria: Admin order management

Description: Admin can view all customer orders
Acceptance Criteria:
- Orders dashboard shows all orders
- Order ID, date, customer name, total, status displayed
- Status color coding
- Sort by date, total, status
- Filter by date range, status, customer

Description: Admin can view complete order details
Acceptance Criteria:
- All order items with quantities, prices, SKUs
- Customer information (name, email, phone, address)
- Order date and time
- Payment method and transaction ID
- Shipping address and method

Description: Admin can update order status
Acceptance Criteria:
- Status dropdown: Processing to Shipped to Delivered
- Status change confirmation dialog
- Timestamp recorded automatically
- Customer notification sent on status change
- Status change logged in order history

Description: Admin can generate shipping labels
Acceptance Criteria:
- Generate label button on order detail
- Integration with shipping carrier (FedEx, UPS)
- Shipping address pre-populated
- Label PDF generated and downloadable
- Tracking number auto-populated in order

Description: Admin can process refunds
Acceptance Criteria:
- Refund button on order detail
- Refund type selection (full/partial)
- Reason for refund (dropdown)
- Refund amount calculated or manual override
- Status updated to Refunded

Description: Admin can view sales metrics and KPIs
Acceptance Criteria:
- Key metrics: revenue, order count, AOV
- Date range options: Today, This Week, This Month, Custom
- Revenue trend chart
- Orders trend chart
- Top products by revenue

Description: Admin can analyze traffic and conversions
Acceptance Criteria:
- Daily/monthly unique visitor count
- Traffic source breakdown
- Page views and bounce rate
- Conversion funnel visualization
- Product view to purchase conversion %

Description: Admin can analyze customer metrics
Acceptance Criteria:
- New customer count by period
- Customer lifetime value distribution
- Repeat purchase rate
- Customer retention cohort analysis
- RFM analysis (Recency, Frequency, Monetary)

Description: Admin can view product performance
Acceptance Criteria:
- Revenue per product
- Units sold per product
- Profit margin per product
- Return rate per product
- High performers vs. slow movers

Description: Admin can generate inventory reports
Acceptance Criteria:
- Total inventory value
- Stock level by category
- Stock turnover by product
- Low-moving products
- Reorder recommendations

Description: Navigation state management and user experience
Acceptance Criteria: Page navigation

Description: User can navigate between pages
Acceptance Criteria:
- Navigation menu works consistently
- User can navigate between pages
- Navigation maintains state
- Back button maintains correct state
- Refresh maintains correct state

Summary: US-052: Authentication Required for Protected Pages
Description: User cannot access protected pages without login
Acceptance Criteria:
- User cannot skip steps via URL
- Deep links require authentication
- Logout redirects correctly
- Unauthorized access returns 401

Description: Checkout workflow follows correct sequence
Acceptance Criteria:
- Workflow follows correct sequence
- Navigation does not allow step skipping
- Navigation does not duplicate actions
- URL reflects correct state
- Errors handled gracefully

Description: UI loads quickly and responds to user actions
Acceptance Criteria:
- Pages load within 2 seconds
- UI responsive across devices
- No UI overlap or break
- Buttons respond correctly
- Loading indicators visible

Description: Application is mobile responsive
Acceptance Criteria:
- All features work on mobile (320px width)
- Touch-friendly buttons and inputs
- Mobile-optimized images
- Fast loading on 4G networks
- Mobile payment integration

Description: Data consistency API reliability and system observability
Acceptance Criteria: API data consistency

Description: API returns correct and consistent data
Acceptance Criteria:
- API returns correct product data
- API returns correct cart data
- API returns correct order data
- API returns correct status codes
- API responses match UI expectations

Description: API handles errors gracefully
Acceptance Criteria:
- API returns appropriate error codes
- Error messages are descriptive
- API handles timeouts gracefully
- Retry mechanism for failed requests
- Error logging for debugging

Description: API enforces authentication correctly
Acceptance Criteria:
- API authentication enforced correctly
- Invalid tokens rejected with 401
- Token expiration enforced
- Token refresh mechanism working
- API and UI validation consistent

Description: Test environment has clean test data
Acceptance Criteria:
- Test data resets between sessions
- Pre-populated test products available
- Test user accounts provided
- Sample orders in various statuses
- Data reset functionality

Description: System logs important events
Acceptance Criteria:
- Logs generated for failures
- Logs contain sufficient detail
- System behavior consistent across users
- Errors traceable via logs
- System observable end-to-end

Description: System performs well under load
Acceptance Criteria:
- No memory leaks on repeated actions
- Performance stable under stress
- Concurrent user support (10,000+)
- Cache hit rate > 80%
- Page load time < 2 seconds

Description: QA infrastructure testing tools and test coverage measurement
Acceptance Criteria: QA tools

Description: QA team has dedicated test accounts
Acceptance Criteria:
- Admin test account provided
- Manager test account provided
- Customer test account(s) provided
- Test credentials documented securely
- Test accounts resettable to initial state

Description: QA team has documented test cases
Acceptance Criteria:
- Test case template standardized
- Test case repository available
- Tag test cases by feature/module
- Version control for test cases
- Link test cases to requirements

Description: QA team can execute tests and generate reports
Acceptance Criteria:
- Test execution form (pass/fail/skip/blocked)
- Screenshot/video capture support
- Bug linking from test results
- Test summary report generation
- Export reports as PDF/Excel

Description: QA team can report bugs
Acceptance Criteria:
- Bug report form with required fields
- Severity/priority selection
- Steps to reproduce
- Screenshot/video attachment
- Submit to issue tracking (Jira integration)

Description: QA team has stable test environments
Acceptance Criteria:
- Multiple test environments (Dev, Staging, Performance)
- Environment status dashboard
- Deploy to test environment capability
- Data reset per environment
- Environment monitoring and alerting

Description: QA team has API testing tools
Acceptance Criteria:
- RESTful API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger)
- Postman/Insomnia collections available
- API sandbox environment
- Test data endpoints for setup/teardown
- Rate limit testing capabilities

Description: QA team can execute performance tests
Acceptance Criteria:
- Load testing API endpoints
- UI performance monitoring
- Page load time tracking
- Concurrent user simulation
- Performance report generation

Description: QA team can test on mobile devices
Acceptance Criteria:
- Device testing matrix documented
- BrowserStack/cloud device access
- Mobile emulators available
- Network condition simulation
- Mobile-specific bug reporting
